auth.label: API Key
auth.description: SMTP2GO API key used with the X-Smtp2go-Api-Key request header. Create and manage keys in the SMTP2GO app under Sending > API Keys: https://app.smtp2go.com/.

actions.name: get_email_summary
actions.description: Retrieve SMTP2GO account email statistics and current sending cycle summary.

username.description: The optional SMTP2GO username to return statistics for.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving an SMTP2GO email summary.

summary.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO email summary result.

actions.name: get_email_template
actions.description: Retrieve details for a single SMTP2GO email template by ID.

id.description: The case-sensitive SMTP2GO email template ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for viewing an SMTP2GO template.

template.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO email template detail.

actions.name: list_sender_domains
actions.description: List SMTP2GO sender domains and their verification metadata.

domain.description: Only return records for this sender domain.

subaccount_id.description: The subaccount ID to query on behalf of.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SMTP2GO sender domains.

domains.description: The sender domain records returned by SMTP2GO.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO sender domain list.

actions.name: list_single_sender_emails
actions.description: List SMTP2GO single sender email addresses and verification status.

email_address.description: Only return single sender emails matching this address.

subaccount_id.description: The subaccount ID to query on behalf of.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SMTP2GO single sender emails.

senders.description: The single sender email records returned by SMTP2GO.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO single sender email list.

actions.name: search_activity
actions.description: Search SMTP2GO email activity events with optional filters and pagination.

start_date.description: The inclusive start datetime for the activity search.

end_date.description: The exclusive end datetime for the activity search.

search.description: A text search across SMTP2GO activity search fields.

search_email_id.description: The SMTP2GO email ID to search for.

search_usernames.description: SMTP2GO usernames to include in the activity search.

subaccounts.description: SMTP2GO subaccount IDs to include in the activity search.

limit.description: The maximum number of events to return.

continue_token.description: The continuation token from a previous activity search.

only_latest.description: Whether to return only the most recent event for each email.

only_latest_by_sent.description: Whether to return the most recent event for each email ordered by sent date.

event_types.description: SMTP2GO event types used to filter activity results.

include_headers.description: Whether to include full email headers in returned events.

custom_headers.description: Custom header names to extract from returned raw headers.

region.description: The SMTP2GO activity region to query.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching SMTP2GO activity events.

events.description: The SMTP2GO activity events returned for this page.

totalEvents.description: The total number of matching events reported by SMTP2GO.

anyOf.description: The continuation token returned by SMTP2GO when another page is available.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO activity search result.

actions.name: search_email_templates
actions.description: Search SMTP2GO email templates by terms, tags, sorting, and pagination.

fuzzy_search.description: Whether search terms should use wildcard matching.

search_terms.description: Template search terms matched against name, tag, ID, or subject.

tags.description: Template tags used to filter results.

page_size.description: The maximum number of templates to return.

continue_token.description: The continuation token from a previous template search.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching SMTP2GO email templates.

templates.description: The SMTP2GO templates returned for this page.

totalCount.description: The total number of matching templates reported by SMTP2GO.

anyOf.description: The continuation token returned by SMTP2GO when another page is available.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO email template search result.

actions.name: send_email
actions.description: Send a standard JSON email through SMTP2GO without Base64 attachments or inline files.

sender.description: The name and email address to send from, such as Sender <sender@example.com>.

items.description: One email address or name/address pair accepted by SMTP2GO.

to.description: The email addresses to send to, up to 100 recipients.

items.description: One email address or name/address pair accepted by SMTP2GO.

cc.description: The email addresses to CC, up to 100 recipients.

items.description: One email address or name/address pair accepted by SMTP2GO.

bcc.description: The email addresses to BCC, up to 100 recipients.

subject.description: The subject of the email. If template_id is provided, SMTP2GO ignores this value.

html_body.description: The HTML email body. Either html_body or text_body is required when template_id is omitted.

text_body.description: The plain-text email body. Either html_body or text_body is required when template_id is omitted.

items.description: A custom email header object accepted by SMTP2GO.

custom_headers.description: Custom headers to add to the email.

template_id.description: The SMTP2GO template ID to use for this send.

template_data.description: The template variable values passed to SMTP2GO.

schedule.description: A future SMTP2GO schedule timestamp within the next three days.

fastaccept.description: Whether SMTP2GO should accept the email immediately and send it in the background.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for sending a standard email through SMTP2GO.

succeeded.description: The number of recipients SMTP2GO accepted.

failed.description: The number of recipients SMTP2GO rejected.

failures.description: Recipient failure objects returned by SMTP2GO.

anyOf.description: The SMTP2GO email ID when present.
The SMTP2GO schedule ID when the email was scheduled.

data.description: The raw data object returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO standard email send result.

actions.name: view_api_key_permissions
actions.description: List the SMTP2GO API endpoint permissions available to the connected API key.

inputSchema.description: The empty input payload for this SMTP2GO action.

permissions.description: The SMTP2GO endpoint permissions available to the current API key.

data.description: The raw permissions payload returned by SMTP2GO.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SMTP2GO API key permissions response.
